blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,314 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
